title: Penguin Solutions Stock Surges on AMD Deal, Revenue Upgrade
summary: PENG stock rose 13% after AMD partnership and upgraded forecast. VP divested shares. Closing at $44.23.
charlotte_impact: Highlights positive market response to strategic partnerships and financial outlook for Penguin Solutions.

title: Nebius Stock Approaches 52-Week High After Tech Partnerships
summary: NBIS shares near 52-week peak at $177.08 after tech partnerships and $643M acquisition. Analyst rating: Moderate Buy.
charlotte_impact: Indicates strong investor confidence driven by strategic growth and market positioning in AI.

title: Penguin Solutions Stock Rockets on AMD Partnership, Forecast Boost
summary: PENG stock jumps 13.47% to $44.23 after AMD partnership reveal. VP sold $173,750 in shares.

title: Globalstar Launches XCOM RAN Private 5G for Physical AI
summary: Globalstar's XCOM RAN offers end-to-end private 5G for physical AI, enabling automation across industries.

title: Vodafone Deploys AI Tool to Combat Scam Calls

title: Neos Networks and Cornerstone Collaborate on Edge Cloud
summary: Neos Networks partners with Cornerstone to provide connectivity for StonesThro's distributed sovereign edge cloud.

title: Accenture, Vodafone, and SAP Trial Humanoid Robot
summary: Accenture, Vodafone, and SAP pilot humanoid robotics in warehouses, exploring advanced robotics and physical AI.

title: DT Criticizes Restrictive EU AI Regulations
summary: Deutsche Telekom CEO laments the "overly restrictive framework" of EU AI regulations, citing concerns for competitiveness.

title: SoftBank Unveils Brain's Natural AI Phone

title: Meta Plans to Power AI Data Centers from Space

title: Sony AI Develops Table Tennis Robot That Beats Elite Players

title: Nokia's Q1 Boosted by AI Networking Gear Sales
summary: Nokia's Q1 results show growth driven by sales of networking gear to AI players, offsetting stagnation elsewhere.

title: EU Aims to Ensure Android Compatibility with All AI

title: The Shift from Telcos to Intent-Nets
